definition: The mode in which a project-local schema extends the base schema instead of replacing it.
A schema defined inside a project directory that applies only to that project.
The single configuration file read at startup from the project root.
The service that stores and serves versioned base schemas.
The rule set that decides how project-local values combine with base values.
A single end-to-end run of schema validation over a project.
The vocabulary block pasted at the top of a spec or proposal document.
An OpenSpec proposal that has not yet been accepted as a spec.
